mission.title: netdata: self-cleaning obsolete cgroups and network interfaces from memory
mission.description:
## the problem

Containers are ephemeral by nature. Prior to this PR, netdata had 2 issues:

1. network interface alarms where triggering when containers were stopped
2. charts were never cleaned up, so after some time dozens of containers were showing up on the dashboard, and they were occupying memory.

## the solution

network interfaces and cgroups are now self-cleaned.

So, when a network interface or container stops, netdata might log a few errors in error.log complaining about files it ca

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
mkdir netdata_ktsaou
cd netdata_ktsaou
git clone https://github.com/ktsaou/netdata.git --depth=1
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:

